_notes: ITAR/Allied Nation status for general guidance only. Actual ITAR compliance requires qualified legal counsel. Sources: ITAR Part 126.1, US State Dept MNNA list, NATO membership as of 2025.

five_eyes.label: Five Eyes
five_eyes.description: Core intelligence-sharing alliance. Highest trust for defense operations.

nato.label: NATO Ally
nato.description: NATO member state. Article 5 mutual defense commitment.

ally.label: US Treaty Ally
ally.description: Major Non-NATO Ally (MNNA) or equivalent close US partner. Favorable for defense cooperation.

caution.label: Caution
caution.description: Strategic competitor or significant export control concerns. Not embargoed but substantial restrictions apply. Legal review strongly advised.

restricted.label: Restricted / ITAR
restricted.description: ITAR Part 126.1 embargoed, UN arms embargo, or comprehensive US sanctions in effect. Defense-related activity generally prohibited without specific license.
